_comment: Resource-pack credit data for the README generator. Resource packs are bundled as FILES (not metadata), so this is hand-maintained. Every entry carries the same fields as the mods table: desc, authors, license, note (rendered as a footnote), and a source link (URL, or 'Bundled' for Novus-made packs). Licenses verified against each project's Modrinth/CurseForge listing or in-file LICENSE on 2026-06-05. Update when packs are added/removed in config/paxi/resourcepacks/ or resourcepacks/.
intro: Novus ships a curated texture and animation stack, applied automatically through Paxi, plus a few opt-in packs you can turn on yourself. They come in three groups: third-party packs included whole, Novus packs that merge or adapt third-party work, and the original Novus3D_* / Novus_* packs built for this pack. The original packs pull models and textures directly from the upstream "source packs" listed further down, so those upstream licenses still govern the bundled assets. Each table below uses the same columns as the Mods list above.

bundled_whole.desc: Soft contact shadows cast under blocks, plants, and entities.
bundled_whole.note: Bundled with credit; get permission before any public release.

bundled_whole.desc: Expressive, fluid animations for vanilla mobs, driven by EMF custom entity models.
bundled_whole.note: Fresh Animations terms of use: modpack inclusion allowed with credit; no redistribution of the standalone pack.

bundled_whole.pack: FA Extensions — Emissive, Player, Quivers, Spiders
bundled_whole.desc: Add-on layers for Fresh Animations: glowing eyes, animated player models, visible bow quivers, and reworked spiders.
bundled_whole.note: Fresh Animations terms of use: modpack inclusion allowed with credit; no redistribution of the standalone pack.

bundled_whole.pack: Vanilla Tweaks packs (3D Amethyst/Dripstone/Redstone Dust, Age-25 Kelp, Compass Lodestone, Disc Redstone, Groovy Levers)
bundled_whole.desc: Small vanilla-faithful texture and model tweaks, applied automatically through Paxi.
bundled_whole.note: Vanilla Tweaks terms: include only if modified, credited, and kept free; no verbatim re-hosting.

bundled_whole.desc: Randomizes block textures (stone, planks, and more) for visual variety.
bundled_whole.note: Vanilla Tweaks terms: include only if modified, credited, and kept free; no verbatim re-hosting.

bundled_whole.desc: More transparent water for clearer underwater visibility.
bundled_whole.note: Vanilla Tweaks terms: include only if modified, credited, and kept free; no verbatim re-hosting.

bundled_whole.desc: Shows each note block's instrument and pitch on its face.
bundled_whole.note: Vanilla Tweaks terms: include only if modified, credited, and kept free; no verbatim re-hosting.

bundled_whole.desc: Quark's retro programmer-art block and item textures.

derived.desc: AL's Zombies Revamped merged with Azu's Enhanced Zombie Variants FA and fixed up for 1.20.1.
derived.note: Fresh Animations terms of use: modpack inclusion allowed with credit; no redistribution of the standalone pack.

derived.desc: The pre-rework vanilla witch CEM, extracted from the Fresh Animations base.
derived.note: Fresh Animations terms of use: modpack inclusion allowed with credit; no redistribution of the standalone pack.

derived.desc: Compatibility patch bridging the FA: Player Extension pack and Player Animator.
Recolors of Stridey's Vanilla Tweaks 3D Amethyst crystal template for Tinkers' corundum and slime crystals.
derived.authors: Stridey / Vanilla Tweaks · recolored by z0nb1
derived.note: Vanilla Tweaks terms: include only if modified, credited, and kept free; no verbatim re-hosting.

original_intro: By z0nb1 (b1ll3b0b). Each one assembles or adapts assets from the source packs below rather than drawing new art, so the upstream licenses apply to those assets. The Description column lists what each pack provides and which source packs it draws from.

original.desc: 3D torch geometry applied to the Infinity Buttons mod's levers and buttons. Drawn from Actually 3D.
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

original.desc: 3D plants and foliage. Drawn from Vanilla Tweaks, Actually 3D, Allure 3D Plants, and Tinkers' Construct 3D.
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

original.desc: 3D crafting, cooking, and storage stations. Drawn from Actually 3D (crafting) and Heycronus Furnaces 3D + Craft 3D + Barrel 3D.
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

original.desc: 3D ladders. Drawn from RAY's 3D Ladders, Vanilla Tweaks, and mega_trainer's Ladder 3D Pack.
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

original.desc: 3D rails. Drawn from Actually 3D, RAY's 3D Rails, and mega_trainer's Modded Rail 3D Pack.
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

original.desc: 3D brewing stand. Drawn from Actually 3D, with an Amendments tint patch.
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

original.desc: 3D doors and trapdoors. Drawn from Actually 3D and Supplementaries 3D Doors & Trapdoors.
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

original.desc: 3D crops. Drawn from crops-3d (base), Actually 3D, and REVIVED Farmer's Delight Crops 3D.
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

original.desc: Connected glass plus cleaner stained-glass panes. Drawn from Fusion Connected Glass (base) and Better Stained Glass (panes).
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

original.desc: Recolored Botania mystical flowers and per-mod redstone-dust disc textures. Novus-original, Vanilla Tweaks-style.
original.note: Original Novus pack by z0nb1 (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). The 3D models and textures it assembles stay under their upstream source-pack licenses, listed below.

sources_intro: These upstream packs are where the Novus-made packs above draw their models and textures. Licenses confirmed from each project's listing or in-file LICENSE on 2026-06-05. A blank License cell means none was stated anywhere — treat it as All Rights Reserved until confirmed.

sources.name: Actually 3D — Blocks & Items r1.8
sources.desc: 3D models for vanilla blocks and items.

sources.name: RAY's 3D Ladders / 3D Rails
sources.note: LICENSE confirmed inside the pack file.

sources.name: Vanilla Tweaks (incl. Stridey's 3D Amethyst)
sources.desc: Vanilla-faithful tweaks; source of the 3D amethyst crystal template.
sources.note: Vanilla Tweaks terms: include only if modified, credited, and kept free; no verbatim re-hosting.

sources.name: Heycronus 3D packs — Craft 3D, Barrel 3D, Furnaces 3D, Better 3D Beds
sources.desc: 3D crafting table, barrel, furnaces, and beds.
sources.note: Furnaces 3D replaced the previous Undopia furnaces source.

sources.name: Better Stained Glass
sources.note: No license stated on the listing; treat as All Rights Reserved until confirmed.

sources.name: Ladder 3D · Modded Rail 3D
sources.note: Listing states "do not repost" — personal use only, no redistribution.

sources.name: Supplementaries 3D Doors & Trapdoors
sources.desc: 3D door and trapdoor models for Supplementaries.

sources.name: crops-3d (base of Novus3D_Crops)
sources.desc: 3D crop models; the base layer of Novus3D_Crops.
sources.note: No license stated on the listing; confirm before public release.

sources.name: Tinkers' Construct (referenced textures)
sources.desc: Source of a few referenced 3D textures; the mod itself, not a separate pack.

datapacks_intro: Datapacks bundled in the pack — either applied automatically through Paxi (config/paxi/datapacks/) or merged into the KubeJS data layer (kubejs/data/). Each stays under its author's license.

datapacks.name: Repurposed Structures — Chef's Delight, Farmer's Delight & VillagersPlus compat
datapacks.desc: Adds the compat structure variants for those mods. Applied via Paxi.
datapacks.authors: telepathicgrunt (the Farmer's Delight variant credits pm095)

datapacks.name: Respite: There's Ash in My Coffee!!
datapacks.desc: Wild coffee and tea-bush worldgen plus kettle loot for Farmer's Respite. Merged into kubejs/data/farmersrespite.
